source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for calm analytical product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body text, labels, data, and quiet long-form notes.
layout: Dense but unhurried 8px grids, peat-edge sectioning, moss focus states, pool-reflection surfaces, compact observation dashboards, and restrained wetland texture.

prompts.label: Transparent bog pool motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a bog pool motif for a Morphous catalog bundle named "Morphous Bog". The subject is a compact peat wetland pool: dark peat-brown water, floating sphagnum moss mats, moss-green hummocks, thin sedge stems, sky-grey reflected surface patches, and a slow quiet wetland silhouette. No text.
Subject: A centered isolated landscape cutout of a bog pool edge with dark tea-colored peat water, soft moss islands, tiny water ripples, grey overcast reflections, and subtle organic wetland textures.
Composition/framing: centered complete motif with generous padding; do not crop the pool, moss mats, sedges, or peat edge; the whole subject should read clearly as a bog pool motif.
Lighting/mood: soft overcast daylight, muted peat brown, moss green, sky grey, calm slow knowledge-system mood, natural material detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no people, no animals, no cabins, no boardwalk, no boats, no mountains, no text, no watermark, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection outside the subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Bog" derived from the visible transparent bog pool motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the motif: peat-brown water, moss-green sphagnum islands, sky-grey reflected pool surface, sedge-line verticals, soft wetland edges, and a slow knowledge-system feel. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution design board, target 3840x2160 visual density, crisp readable text, no tiny labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Bog, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: peat brown, moss green, sky grey, dark pool ink, sphagnum gold, reed tan, mist surface, shallow-water olive. Muted natural colors only.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; calm labels and readable numerals.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, quiet analytical interface for a slow knowledge system, peat-edge dividers, moss focus rings, pool-reflection surfaces, restrained shadows.
Composition: clean organized board with large readable blocks, motif thumbnail, palette chips with names and hex-like labels, component examples, data panels, and token strip.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no beige-only palette, no stock marketing hero, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Bog".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Bog design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent bog pool motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the peat-brown water, moss-green sphagnum, sky-grey reflection, reed tan, sphagnum gold, pool-ink surfaces, moss focus states, Japanese typography guidance, 8px radius, shadcn/tweakcn component coverage, and slow knowledge-system tone.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution design board, target 3840x2160 visual density, crisp readable text, no tiny labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Bog, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep pool-ink background, peat-brown cards, pale mist text, moss-green primary actions, sphagnum-gold highlights, reed-tan secondary accents, sky-grey dividers, low-contrast wetland texture, restrained shadow, quiet analytical dashboard for observation and notes.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, sidebar navigation, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error/success states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Composition: same organized board structure as the light board, with motif thumbnail, palette chips, component examples, dashboard panels, forms, table, status states, and token strip.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Bog", no watermark.
